title: betula × pseudocarpatica
intro: Betula × pseudocarpatica, also known as the hybrid birch, is a cross between the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the white birch (Betula pendula). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Betula × pseudocarpatica include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Betula × pseudocarpatica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
